title: pharus lappulaceus subsp. glaber
intro: Pharus lappulaceus subsp. glaber is a plant species, specifically a type of grass, that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pharus lappulaceus subsp. glaber can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
